title: Slovakian Hash Browns with Crispy Pork
description: A hearty breakfast dish featuring crispy pork and Slovakian hash browns.
instructions: 2. Season the pork cubes with salt, pepper, and Slovakian paprika.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the beaten eggs with a splash of water.
4. Dip each pork cube into the egg wash, coating it evenly.
5. Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add a small amount of oil to prevent sticking.
6. Sear the pork cubes until golden brown on all sides, about 5 minutes per side.
7. Transfer the pork to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Spread the store-bought or homemade hash browns on top of the pork, forming a layer.
9. Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until the hash browns are crispy and golden brown.
10. Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
